name: R. Carlos Nakai
abstract: Raymond Carlos Nakai (born April 16, 1946) is an American flutist. Nakai played brass instruments in high school and college, and auditioned for the Armed Forces School of Music after a two-year period in the United States Navy.

concerts.label: Tibet House U.S. Benefit Concert
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: Father Al Lewis
about_quotes.evidence: [INTERVIEWER] That's funny. You never met him? [INTERVIEWEE] ... Carlos, yeah. Drum player. Yeah, drum player.
